title: Proudly Point - Shaping leaders, building community
description: BUSINESS NEWS - At Point High school, we...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - At Point High school, we believe that education is more than just academics – it's about nurturing responsible, value-driven individuals who will shape the future of Mossel Bay.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - At Point High school, we believe that education is more than just academics – it's about nurturing responsible, value-driven individuals who will shape the future of Mossel Bay."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Founded in 1921, our bilingual school has proudly served generations of learners, offering not only academic excellence but also strong cultural and sports programmes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With boarding facilities available at Huis Pepler, we welcome students from across the region into our dynamic school community.","html":"With boarding facilities available at Huis Pepler, we welcome students from across the region into our dynamic school community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Being nominated in the Best of Mossel Bay Awards is a true honour. It confirms that our efforts to stay relevant and connected to the needs of our community are being recognised.","html":"Being nominated in the Best of Mossel Bay Awards is a true honour. It confirms that our efforts to stay relevant and connected to the needs of our community are being recognised."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This nomination reflects the strong bond between Point and the people we serve.","html":"This nomination reflects the strong bond between Point and the people we serve."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Vote here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We strive to remain a leader in education by constantly innovating and pushing boundaries.","html":"We strive to remain a leader in education by constantly innovating and pushing boundaries."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our holistic approach ensures every learner can grow and excel in their area of strength - be it academics, culture or sport.","html":"Our holistic approach ensures every learner can grow and excel in their area of strength - be it academics, culture or sport."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As Albert Einstein once said, “Education is what remains after one has forgotten what one has learned in school”.","html":"As Albert Einstein once said, “Education is what remains after one has forgotten what one has learned in school”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At Point, we aim to leave that lasting impact. Vote for Point High school - not just because we’re proud of our legacy, but because we’re building a bright future for Mossel Bay.","html":"At Point, we aim to leave that lasting impact. Vote for Point High school - not just because we’re proud of our legacy, but because we’re building a bright future for Mossel Bay."},{"type":"list","items":["044 691 2247","[email protected]"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Proudly Point - Shaping leaders, building community
